prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年约3881名→2022年约4400名→2023年约4325名→2024年约5623名→2025年约4989名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2024年达到近年最高位次后2025年有所回落，近2年 累计后移约600名；2025年基准约4989名；本省综合类计划2021-2024年稳定在202-204人，2025年增至222人，2026年计划242人，较2025年扩招20人（约9 .0%），扩招使竞争略有加剧，位次数字相应增大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年升至第50名，较2025年第60名上升10位，学校综合实力 和声誉持续提升，对考生吸引力增强；近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度总排名第64位（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量中等；无历史投档断档 记录，录取稳定性高；信息与通信工程A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技术A-、网络空间安全A-、软件工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，信息通 信领域学科优势突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2024年"高热推荐"，计算机类"推荐"（67.8），相关专业持续热门；北京市2026年考生约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，竞争显著加剧。北京邮电大学位于北京市，为本市高校，对本市考生有天然的地域偏好优势；该校在本市招生计划持续增加，本地考生报考意愿较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025 年基准位次约4989名、2026年扩招20人、北京市考生规模大幅增长29.7%以及软科排名上升至第50名等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次约5309名，区 间4809-5809名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（元班）
- 电子信息类（元班）
- 计算机类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 通信工程（大类招生）
- 电子信息类
- 软件工程
- 人工智能（大类招生）
- 网络空间安全（大类招生）
- 自动化类（智能机器人）
- 低空技术与工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 法学（与中国政法大学联合学位）
- 工商管理（数智管理实验班）
- 网络与新媒体
- 英语（语言智能实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4809-5809名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向（通信工程、电子信息类、软件工程等），一档专业（计算机类元班等）作为冲刺目标，三档专业（法学联合学 位、工商管理等）作为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（4809名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。北邮信息通信类学科优势突出，建议优先选择与A+学科相关的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Approximately 3881 in 2021 → 4400 in 2022 → 4325 in 2023 → 5623 in 2024 → 4989 in 2025, overall showing a fluctuating backward trend, reaching the highest ranking in 2024 and then declining in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 600 places in the last 2 years; 2025 baseline approximately 4989; provincial comprehensive enrollment plan stable at 202-204 from 2021-2024, increasing to 222 in 2025, and planned 242 in 2026, an expansion of 20 students (about 9.0%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition and increasing ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science China University Rankings rose to 50th in 2026, up 10 places from 60th in 2025, with continuously improving comprehensive strength and reputation, enhancing attractiveness to candidates; stable reputation in recent years, no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin heat total ranking 64th (evaluation "average"), moderate short video exposure; no historical admission gaps, high admission stability; Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top nationally), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Cyberspace Security A-, Software Engineering A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding advantages in information and communication fields, highly matching enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors "highly recommended" in 2024, Computer majors "recommended" (67.8), related majors remain popular; Beijing candidates in 2026 approximately 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is located in Beijing, a local university with natural regional preference advantages for local candidates; its enrollment plan in the city continues to increase, with strong local candidate willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 4989, expansion of 20 students in 2026, a significant 29.7% increase in Beijing candidate numbers, and the Soft Science ranking rising to 50th, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 5309, with a range of 4809-5809.

Tier 2 (Medium)

- Electronic Information Class

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 4809-5809, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction (Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Class, Software Engineering, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Class Yuan Class, etc.) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Law Joint Degree, Business Administration, etc.) as safety choices. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 4809) can focus on sprinting for top Tier 1 majors. BUPT has outstanding advantages in information and communication disciplines, so it is recommended to prioritize majors related to A+ disciplines.
